title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 522.160 - Actions on penal bonds
text:
522.160.  Actions on penal bonds. — In all actions brought upon bonds in which there is a condition or defeasance, by which the same is to become void on the payment of a less sum, the plaintiff shall set out the condition in his petition, and may assign as many breaches as he may think proper.
(RSMo 1939 § 3263) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2876; 1919 § 1026; 1909 § 1233
